themes.title: Far-right parties push 'national priority' policies
themes.blurb: Right-wing and far-right parties across Europe are intensifying their focus on 'national priority' policies, which prioritize citizens over immigrants in access to social services, housing, and welfare. This theme has gained traction in Spain, Italy, and Sweden, with parties like Vox, Lega, and Sverigedemokraterna advocating for stricter immigration controls and preferential treatment for nationals.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Proposes 'national priority' in housing and social aid, criticizing PP and PSOE for neglecting Spaniards.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Advocates for policies favoring Italian citizens in social services and infrastructure projects.

countries.name: 🇸🇪 Sverigedemokraterna
countries.note: Pushes for national priority in school meals and public services, excluding religious accommodations.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: Emphasizes national priority in welfare and immigration policies, aligning with broader European far-right trends.

countries.name: 🇳🇴 Fremskrittspartiet
countries.note: Advocates for stricter citizenship tests and prioritizing Norwegian citizens in welfare policies.

themes.title: Trump’s policies dominate global right-wing coverage
themes.blurb: Donald Trump's foreign and domestic policies continue to shape right-wing discourse worldwide, with his administration's actions—such as Iran negotiations, tariffs, and immigration reforms—being closely followed and debated in countries like Poland, Italy, and Argentina. His influence extends to electoral strategies and policy debates in these nations.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Trump's Iran policies, tariffs, and immigration reforms are central to U.S. right-wing discourse.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: Polish right-wing media closely follows Trump's policies, particularly on Iran and immigration.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Italian right-wing parties align with Trump's foreign policy stances, particularly on Iran and trade.

countries.name: 🇦🇷 La Libertad Avanza
countries.note: Argentina's libertarian government adopts Trump-style rhetoric and policies, particularly on deregulation and anti-socialism.

themes.title: Reform UK’s electoral surge reshapes UK politics
themes.blurb: Reform UK's unprecedented gains in local elections have sent shockwaves through British politics, challenging Labour's dominance and reshaping the political landscape. The party's success is driven by anti-immigration rhetoric and dissatisfaction with mainstream parties, resonating across England and Scotland.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Reform UK wins over 1,400 council seats, becoming the largest opposition party in several regions.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Trump endorses Reform UK's anti-immigration stance, influencing its electoral strategy.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Italian right-wing parties monitor Reform UK's success as a model for anti-establishment politics.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: RN draws parallels with Reform UK's electoral strategy, emphasizing anti-immigration policies.

themes.title: Corruption scandals rock far-right governments
themes.blurb: Corruption allegations are undermining far-right governments and parties across multiple countries, including Argentina, Hungary, and Poland. These scandals involve misuse of public funds, nepotism, and conflicts of interest, eroding public trust in these administrations.

countries.name: 🇦🇷 La Libertad Avanza
countries.note: Scandals involving Manuel Adorni and Karina Milei dominate Argentine media, with allegations of illicit enrichment and nepotism.

countries.name: 🇭🇺 Fidesz / Tisza
countries.note: Hungary's new Tisza government faces allegations of corruption under Orbán's regime, including misuse of EU funds.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: Polish PiS party embroiled in scandals involving Zbigniew Ziobro and misuse of public funds.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Vox faces criticism over alleged misuse of public funds and nepotism in regional governments.

themes.title: Hungary’s political transition dominates coverage
themes.blurb: Hungary's political transition from Viktor Orbán's Fidesz government to Péter Magyar's Tisza Party has become a focal point in European right-wing media. The shift is marked by investigations into corruption, luxury spending, and the dismantling of Orbán's political network.

countries.name: 🇭🇺 Fidesz / Tisza
countries.note: Tisza Party forms new government, vowing to dismantle Orbán's legacy and address corruption.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: U.S. right-wing media covers Hungary's transition as a model for anti-establishment governance.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: Polish right-wing media draws parallels between Hungary's transition and Poland's political shifts.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Italian right-wing parties monitor Hungary's transition for lessons on governance and anti-corruption measures.
